title: I Used Microsoft's New MAI Models – Here's The Truth
description: Microsoft's MAI Suite promises an all-in-one AI solution, but how does it actually perform in the real world? I've been hands-on with MAI-Thinking-1, MAI-Code-1, and MAI-Image-2.5, and I'm sharing my honest experience – the good, the bad, and the cost. #MicrosoftAI #MAIModels #TechReview #AIModels #ToolBreakdown #AzureAI
